name: [ Digital Snapshots ]
prompt: __film/styles/digital-snapshots__

name: Phone Snapshot [Candid & Deep Focus]
prompt: Style: casual smartphone snapshot, everything in focus with deep phone-sensor depth of field, flat auto-HDR exposure, a slightly tilted horizon, and loose framing that clips the edges.

name: Phone Snapshot [Night & Flash]
prompt: Style: night phone snapshot with the built-in flash, the subject slightly overexposed against a quick dark falloff, flat frontal light, everything in focus, and crooked framing.

name: Front Camera Selfie [Arm's Length]
prompt: Style: arm's-length front-camera selfie, the face large and slightly wide-angle, a raised shoulder in frame, a high downward angle, everything in focus, and a tilted horizon.

name: Fisheye Selfie [0.5x Ultrawide]
prompt: Style: 0.5x ultra-wide selfie, fisheye barrel distortion curving the edges, the face slightly bulged, surroundings warping outward, and everything in focus.

name: Mirror Selfie [Phone Visible]
prompt: Style: casual mirror selfie, the phone visible in hand near the face, flat indoor light, everything in focus, a cluttered reflected room, and slightly tilted framing.

name: Tourist Snapshot [Rushed & Clipped]
prompt: Style: rushed tourist phone snapshot, a tilted horizon, passersby with limbs clipped at the edges, everything in deep focus, and flat midday exposure.

name: Table Food Snap [Overhead & Casual]
prompt: Style: casual phone food snapshot, a slightly-off overhead angle, mixed indoor light with a mild cast, the plate and cutlery partly cropped, and everything in focus.

name: [ Flash Photography ]
prompt: __film/styles/flash-photography__

name: Direct Flash [Hard & Frontal]
prompt: Lighting: direct on-camera flash, hard frontal light, a crisp shadow behind the subject, quick falloff, and slightly specular highlights.

name: Amateur Flash [Careless Snapshot]
prompt: Lighting: amateur built-in flash straight at the subject, slightly blown nearest highlights, a dark falloff background, and hasty framing that clips the edges.

name: Surprise Flash [Startled & Caught]
prompt: Lighting: a sudden flash catching the subject off guard, wide eyes and a frozen mid-reaction, hard frontal light with a crisp shadow behind, and dark surroundings.

name: Party Flash [Close & Chaotic]
prompt: Lighting: close-range party flash, the subject at arm's length under hard flash, glossy highlights, motion smear in the dim edges, and other people clipped at the frame edges.

name: Flash at Dusk [Lit Subject & Blue World]
prompt: Lighting: flash at dusk, the subject crisply lit and popping forward from a deep twilight-blue underexposed background, with cool sky tones.

name: Ring Flash Editorial [Shadowless & Glossy]
prompt: Lighting: ring flash, even shadowless frontal light, a thin halo shadow tracing the subject, glossy round catchlights, and flat saturated color.

name: Flash Through Crowd [Obstructed & Urgent]
prompt: Lighting: flash forced through a crowd, the subject lit in the middle distance, dark half-lit heads and hands intruding at the foreground edges, and flash catching haze in the air.

name: CCTV Security [Overhead & Surveillance]

name: Dashcam [Windshield & Wide]
prompt: Style: dashcam still, a wide view through a windshield with the hood edge at the bottom, slightly curved wide-lens geometry, and flat automatic exposure.

name: Trail Camera [IR Night & Wildlife]

name: VHS Camcorder Still [Scanlines & Smeared]
prompt: Style: paused VHS frame, a soft low-resolution video texture with horizontal scanlines, bleeding saturated reds, slight color fringing, and washed-out highlights.

name: 2000s Webcam [Low-Res & Indoor]
prompt: Style: early webcam capture, a soft low-resolution image lit by monitor glow, muddy color with a slight magenta or green cast, and a fixed desk-level upward angle.

name: Tilt-Shift Miniature [Toy World]
prompt: Style: tilt-shift miniature, a high vantage with a narrow band of sharp focus and smooth blur above and below, raised saturation and contrast, and a toy-model look.

name: Holga Toy Camera [Lo-Fi Vignette]
prompt: Style: Holga toy camera, dark corner vignetting, a soft plastic-lens center sharpness, occasional light leaks, and saturated shifted medium-format color.

name: Kodak Aerochrome [Infrared Pink]
prompt: Style: Kodak Aerochrome infrared, green foliage rendered pink to red, deep cyan-blue skies, dark water, and fine grain.

name: Wet Plate Collodion [1800s & Silvery]
prompt: Style: wet plate collodion, a silvery monochrome plate with swirling shallow focus falloff, chemical streaks and drips at the edges, and pale skies.

name: Daguerreotype [Mirror Plate]
prompt: Style: daguerreotype, a finely detailed mirror-like silver plate, a delicate tonal shimmer, soft edge vignetting, and a formal long-exposure stillness.

name: Cyanotype [Prussian Blue]
prompt: Style: cyanotype, the whole image in Prussian blue and white, soft contact-print contrast, visible paper texture, and brushed emulsion edges.

name: Double Exposure [Layered & Ghostly]
prompt: Style: in-camera double exposure, two scenes overlapping translucently, the brighter areas ghosting through the shadows of the other, and film grain unifying both.

name: Flatbed Scan [Scanography & Pressed]
prompt: Style: flatbed scanography, the subject pressed to the glass, sharp where it touches and falling into a black shallow-depth void, and even shadowless scanner light.

name: Passport Photo [Flat & Bureaucratic]
prompt: Style: passport photo, a head-and-shoulders subject facing dead-on, a plain uniform background, flat shadowless light, centered framing, and everything in focus.

name: [ Lighting ]
prompt: __film/styles/lighting__

name: Rim Light [Glowing Edge]
prompt: Lighting: rim light behind the subject tracing a glowing contour, the front in soft shadow, and clean separation from a darker surrounding.

name: Chiaroscuro [Deep Shadow Drama]
prompt: Lighting: chiaroscuro, one directional light carving the subject from deep darkness, a slow tonal turn, and rich dark tones filling most of the frame.

name: Extreme Chiaroscuro [Pitch Black & Stark]
prompt: Lighting: high-contrast chiaroscuro, one hard light on the subject while the rest falls to pitch black with no detail or gradation, an abrupt lit-to-unlit boundary, and minimal fill.
negative_prompt: soft gray shadows, gentle gradation, visible shadow detail, and ambient fill light

name: Sculpting Light [Contours & Folds]
prompt: Lighting: low-angled sculpting light skimming the subject so each curve, fold and crease casts a small soft shadow, with tactile relief and gentle falloff.

name: Soft Diffused Light [Gentle & Wrapping]
prompt: Lighting: large soft diffused light wrapping the subject, feathered soft-edged shadows, smooth tonal transitions, and gentle highlight roll-off.

name: Split Light [Half in Shadow]
prompt: Lighting: hard light from one side only, the near cheek and shoulder lit while the far side of the same subject sinks into shadow, the edge following the subject's own contour, not the edge of the photo.
negative_prompt: a photo split into two halves, a bisected or split-screen composition, or two panels side by side

name: Raking Texture Light [Grazing & Tactile]
prompt: Lighting: raking light grazing across surfaces at a shallow angle, every ridge and thread casting a long micro-shadow, and deep shadow pooling in the recesses.

name: Silhouette Backlight [Dark Shape & Bright Ground]
prompt: Lighting: backlit silhouette, the subject a dark shape against a brighter luminous background, a clean readable outline, and perhaps a thin bright edge fringe.

name: Dappled Light [Broken Patterns]
prompt: Lighting: dappled light broken into patches, as if through leaves or blinds, alternating warm pools and soft shadow, with high local contrast in a gentle overall exposure.

name: [ Composition ]
prompt: __film/styles/composition__

name: Rule of Thirds [Classic Balance]
prompt: Composition: rule of thirds, the subject off-center on a third-line, the horizon on a third, and breathing room ahead of the subject.

name: Central Symmetry [Formal & Frontal]
prompt: Composition: central symmetry, the subject dead center, mirrored left and right halves, upright verticals, and a formal stillness.

name: Asymmetric Balance [Weighted Tension]
prompt: Composition: asymmetric balance, a large element on one side counterweighted by a smaller one across generous uneven space.

name: Dynamic Diagonal [Energy & Motion]
prompt: Composition: diagonal, the main lines running corner to corner, the subject on a tilted axis, and a slight camera cant adding momentum.

name: Tight Crop [Fragment & Intimate]
prompt: Composition: tight crop, the frame cutting into the subject so only a fragment fills it, edges slicing through forms, and no surrounding context.

name: Frame Within Frame [Nested View]
prompt: Composition: a frame within a frame, the subject seen through a doorway, window or arch that borders the image, with layered depth.

name: Layered Depth [Foreground & Midground & Distance]
prompt: Composition: layered depth, a foreground element at the edge, the subject in the midground, and a receding background behind.

name: Dutch Angle [Tilted Unease]
prompt: Composition: Dutch angle, the whole frame rotated so horizon and verticals lean to one side, and the subject held askew.

name: [ Camera position & optics ]
prompt: __film/styles/camera-position-optics__

name: Low Angle [Looking Up & Heroic]
prompt: Composition: viewed from below, low-angle shot, the subject towering, and converging verticals rising through the frame.

name: High Angle [Looking Down & Diminished]
prompt: Composition: viewed from above, high-angle shot looking down, the ground filling the background, and the subject appearing smaller.

name: Overhead Top-Down [Flat Lay & Graphic]
prompt: Composition: directly overhead, a straight-down top-down view, no horizon, and a flat graphic two-dimensional arrangement.

name: Worm's Eye [Ground Level & Extreme]
prompt: Composition: a worm's-eye view at ground level, foreground texture looming close, and the subject rising steeply with strong upward convergence.

name: Telephoto Compression [Stacked & Flattened]
prompt: Composition: a long telephoto from far away, compressed perspective, distant planes stacked close behind the subject, and flattened depth.

name: Wide-Angle Proximity [Close & Stretched]
prompt: Composition: a wide-angle lens from very close, near parts enlarged and gently stretched, the background sweeping away small, and edges pulling outward.

name: Macro Distance [Tiny World & Huge]
prompt: Composition: macro distance, a small subject filling the frame at high magnification, a thin plane of focus, out of focus background, and fine surface detail.

name: Shoulder-Level Candid [Human Height & Present]
prompt: Composition: a shoulder-height view at conversational distance, a natural human vantage, and a modest honest perspective.

name: [ Color & tonality ]
prompt: __film/styles/color-tonality__

name: Muted Earth Tones [Subdued & Organic]
prompt: Color: muted earth tones, a restrained ochre, olive, clay and brown palette, gentle contrast, and dusty khaki greens.

name: High-Key [Bright & Weightless]
prompt: Color: high-key, the tonal range lifted toward bright whites, thin pale shadows, and delicate low contrast.

name: Low-Key [Dark & Reticent]
prompt: Color: low-key, deep blacks and dark tones dominating, only select surfaces lit, and rich shadow detail sinking into darkness.

name: Monochrome Duotone [Two-Tone & Graphic]
prompt: Color: duotone, only two colors, shadows in one deep hue and highlights in a contrasting tone, with smooth gradients between.

name: Bleach Bypass [Desaturated & Harsh]
prompt: Color: bleach bypass, desaturated with only faint hue, raised contrast, chalky highlights, gritty shadows, and a silvery metallic cast.

name: Pastel Wash [Faded & Tender]
prompt: Color: pastel wash, colors diluted toward powdery pinks and milky blues, low contrast, and lifted hazy blacks.

name: Golden Warmth [Amber & Honeyed]
prompt: Color: golden warmth, amber and honey tones over the frame, cream whites, warm brown shadows, and gently boosted yellows.

name: Cold Steel [Blue-Gray & Distant]
prompt: Color: cold, a steely blue-gray cast, icy whites, warm materials drained toward neutral, and slate-teal shadows.

name: [ Atmosphere ]
prompt: __film/styles/atmosphere__

name: Dense Fog [Vanishing & Soft]
prompt: Atmosphere: dense fog, the subject half-dissolved in pale gray-white murk, contrast collapsing with distance, and cool desaturated color.

name: Light Haze [Milky Depth]
prompt: Atmosphere: light haze, distant planes paler and milkier than the foreground, a gentle bloom around bright areas, and slightly lifted blacks.

name: Rain [Wet & Streaked]
prompt: Atmosphere: falling rain, thin streaks against darker areas, wet glistening surfaces, mirror-like puddles, and overcast dim light.

name: Dust in Light [Particles & Shafts]
prompt: Atmosphere: fine dust in the air, visible light shafts through the particles, drifting motes catching the light, and a bloom around bright areas.

name: Heat Shimmer [Wavering & Scorched]
prompt: Atmosphere: heat shimmer, the air above hot surfaces rippling and distorting the background, bleached light, and pale scorched color.

name: Snowfall [Drifting Flakes & Hushed]
prompt: Atmosphere: falling snow, soft flakes drifting through the air, a fresh white layer gathering, and muted gray-white light.

name: Smoke and Mist [Curling & Theatrical]
prompt: Atmosphere: drifting smoke and mist, curling translucent layers between viewer and subject, light scattering into soft glowing pockets, and partial concealment of forms.

name: [ Moment & motion ]
prompt: __film/styles/moment-motion__

name: Frozen Instant [Split-Second & Crisp]
prompt: Composition: a frozen split-second, fast motion arrested crisply, droplets or hair suspended mid-air, and no motion blur.

name: Long Exposure [Smeared Time]
prompt: Composition: long exposure, moving elements smeared into soft translucent trails, water blurred to silk, light drawn into ribbons, while still elements stay sharp.

name: Panning Motion [Sharp Subject & Streaked World]
prompt: Composition: panning, the moving subject kept sharp while the background streaks into horizontal motion blur, giving a sense of speed.

name: Mid-Gesture Candid [Unposed & Between]
prompt: Composition: dynamic, mid-motion, the subject caught between actions, a hand half-raised or weight shifting mid-step, and unposed timing.

name: Motion Blur Subject [Ghosted Movement]
prompt: Composition: the moving subject smeared into a translucent ghost while the scene stays sharp, edges trailing into the space it passed through.

name: [ Focus & depth ]
prompt: __film/styles/focus-depth__

name: Shallow Focus [Isolated & Creamy]
prompt: Focus: shallow depth of field, a thin plane of the subject sharp, out of focus background melting into creamy blur, and the subject lifted from its surroundings.

name: Deep Focus [Everything Sharp]
prompt: Focus: deep depth of field, every plane sharp from foreground to distance, and no blur separating subject from surroundings.

name: Soft Focus Bloom [Diffused & Dreamy]
prompt: Focus: gentle soft focus, fine detail diffused into a delicate glow, highlights blooming softly, and lowered contrast.
